mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT id, upper_id, name, description AS path, 0 AS depth FROM menu_agent WHERE upper_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT m.id, m.upper_id, m.name, m.description AS path, mt.depth + 1 AS depth FROM menu_agent m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.upper_id = mt.id ) SELECT id, upper_id, name, path, depth FROM menu_tree ORDER BY depth, upper_id, id
